meta.title: How to Fix the People and Skills Problem in Securing Building Automation Systems
meta.description:
Why are Building Automation Skills in such an insecure state, and more importantly what will it take to change that? James Houston identifies the challenge in getting people with the right skills involved.

He looks at the job titles, training, salary and other factors in play today. He cites the need to upgrade the team to include more mechanical and network engineers, and to pay for these upgrades by shedding duplicative monitoring services.
